name: SeACo-Paraformer-en — Batch (no biasing) on Gold-92
short_description: Per-clip STT predictions from FunASR SeACo-Paraformer-en in batch mode on all 93 gold-92 benchmark clips. Model produces near-random tokens; WER=122.7% — complete transcription failure.
model_description: iic/speech_seaco_paraformer_asr_nat-en-16k-common-vocab10020, Paraformer-CTC with SeACo module, FunASR Python SDK, GPU inference, no contextual biasing

files.description: Per-clip STT predictions on all 93 gold-92 benchmark clips. Each line: clip_id, hypothesis, latency_seconds.
